title: An Act providing an appropriation from the General Fund of the Treasury of the Government of the Virgin Islands for the operation of the Government of
text:
ACTNO.891 6
BILL NO. 35-0376
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providing an appropriation from the General Fund of the Treasury of the Government of the
Virgin Islands for the operation ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands during the fiscal year October
1, 2024, through September 30, 2025
---0---
Be it enactedby the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. The sums listed herein, or so much thereofas shall be sufficient to accomplish
the purposes specified, as set forth, are appropriated and may be paid from any ffinds in the General
Fund ofthe Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands, which amounts are available for the
fiscal year October 1,2024, through September 30, 2025
